inlineContent.text: DotFaceCore is a part of DotFace framework group which provides components for the digital onboarding process using the latest Innovatrics IFace image processing library. It wraps the core functionality of IFace library to a higher-level module which is easy to integrate into an iOS application.

abstract.text: Head pose query specifies which head pose attributes should be evaluated.
Configure thresholds for the quality attributes of the face auto capture result.
If the threshold property is set to nil, the corresponding quality attribute will not be validated.
